string 2: Hello there. I have something I'd like to discuss with you.
{next}Sure.
{next}You need my help?
{next}Who are you?

I appreciate your eagerness, but you really should be more
suspicious of others.

You're quite perceptive. There is something I wish to ask of
you.

Yes, you have a point. I suppose I should've introduced
myself first.

I'll spare you the details, but I'm the host computer of a
Digital World named "Shambala."

In other words, much like King Drasil, I'm the warden of a
world separate from this one.

With Homeros, the warden of this world, in such a state, I
thought I'd offer my help.

Normally, I'd bring the Tentei Hachibushu with me, but they're
preoccupied at the moment.

I did manage to recruit Susanomon and his subordinates, but
haven't heard back lately.
{next}Are you worried?
{next}Are they lost?
{next}Have they forgotten their mission?

Yes, but they're quite resilient, so I'm not concerned that
they've come to harm.

It's often said that no news is good news, but it'd be good
to hear back from them.

I don't think they're lost. Maybe they just adjusted to
being here a little too well.

Perhaps they've grown so accustomed to this world, they've
forgotten their mission.

It's definitely a possibility. They're Digimon who possess
tremendous adaptability.

It's possible they've acclimated so well that they forgot
their purpose for being here.

From what I can tell, they're not so much slacking off, but
more having too much fun.

They're all quite fond of the Paradise Colosseum. They were
supposed to go there to train, but...
{next}The Paradise Colosseum is pretty fun.
{next}If they're training, isn't that a good thing?
{next}I'll go take a look!

Yes, it would seem so. They're enjoying it much like young
children would.

I doubt they're actually training. I'm sure having fun is
the only thing on their mind.

Wait. Are you planning to join their fun? Well, I guess you
need to go, either way.

Once again, I ask that you go to the Paradise Colosseum for
me.

There, you should find Kotemon and the others I brought with
me.

Look for everyone at the Colosseum and remind them of
their mission. I'm counting on you.

Kotemon and the others are obsessed with the Paradise
Colosseum. Please remind them of their duty.

I heard back from the team. It seems you were successful.
Here. This is for all your help.

If there is anything else I can do for you, please don't
hesitate to ask.

Thanks for your help earlier. Is there anything else you
require my assistance with?

That's actually Homeros's duty, not mine. Although, I
suppose Homeros IS sleeping...

Okay, I'll grant permissions as substitute host. Let's see.
The activation code was...

Thanks for waiting. The permissions have been granted. Don't
lose this. It's important.

My helpers are pretty tough, don't you think? I'm sure
they'll be able to assist you.
